meta.majorLegislation: One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA, P.L. 119-21)
meta.primarySource: Rev. Proc. 2025-32 (released Oct 9, 2025); SSA 2026 wage base announcement
verifyFlags: brackets.headOfHousehold mid-tier thresholds interpolated — confirm against Rev. Proc. 2025-32 §4.01 tables
capitalGains.longTerm 2026 breakpoints estimated at +2.3% over 2025 — confirm against Rev. Proc. 2025-32 §4.03
credits.eitc sub-maximums for 0/1/2 children estimated — confirm §4.06 table
retirement limits from Notice 2025-67 recollection — confirm 401(k) $24,500 / IRA $7,500 / catch-ups
saltCap.phaseoutMAGI 2026 indexed value estimated at $505,000 — confirm
stateInfo copied from 2025 — confirm current-year state rates

seniorBonus.note: OBBBA §70103 senior deduction — available whether itemizing or not, per taxpayer 65+

carLoanInterest.note: New personal-use vehicles with final assembly in the U.S.

amt.note: OBBBA reset phaseout thresholds to $500K/$1M and accelerated phaseout to 50% beginning 2026

saltCap.note: OBBBA cap: $40,000 (2025) escalating 1%/yr; benefit phases down 30% above MAGI threshold but never below $10,000

qbi.note: §199A made permanent by OBBBA; OBBBA widened phase-in ranges to $75K/$150K

giftEstate.note: OBBBA set basic exclusion at $15M per individual for 2026, indexed thereafter

penalties.failureToFile: 5% per month up to 25% of unpaid tax
penalties.estimatedTaxPenalty: Underpayment rate (federal short-term rate + 3%) computed on Form 2210
penalties.safeHarbor: Pay 90% of current-year tax or 100% of prior-year tax (110% if prior-year AGI over $150K)

deadlines.label: Sep 15, 2026
deadlines.desc: Q3 2026 estimated tax due; extended 1065 & 1120-S returns due

deadlines.label: Apr 15, 2027
deadlines.desc: 2026 individual returns due; Q1 2027 estimated tax due

obbbChanges.title: Standard deduction (2026)
obbbChanges.detail: $16,100 single / $32,200 MFJ / $24,150 HOH — permanent structure, indexed annually

obbbChanges.title: Child Tax Credit
obbbChanges.detail: $2,200 per qualifying child ($1,700 refundable), now inflation-indexed

obbbChanges.title: SALT cap
obbbChanges.detail: $40,400 for 2026 (1%/yr escalator through 2029), 30% phasedown above ~$505K MAGI, $10K floor

obbbChanges.title: AMT phaseout reset
obbbChanges.detail: Exemption phaseout now begins at $500K/$1M at a faster 50% rate — a quiet 2026 tax increase for some

obbbChanges.title: Senior deduction
obbbChanges.detail: $6,000 per taxpayer 65+, phases out 6% above $75K/$150K MAGI (2025–2028)

obbbChanges.title: Tips, overtime & car-loan interest
obbbChanges.detail: Deductions continue for 2026: tips up to $25K; overtime premium $12.5K/$25K; U.S.-assembled car loan interest up to $10K

obbbChanges.title: Estate & gift
obbbChanges.detail: $15M basic exclusion per person for 2026; $19K annual gift exclusion

obbbChanges.title: §199A QBI
obbbChanges.detail: 20% deduction permanent; phase-in thresholds $201,775 / $403,550 with widened $75K/$150K ranges

stateInfo._verify: Copied from TY2025 file — confirm current-year state rates before publishing
